name: HTTP Request
description: Make HTTP requests to external APIs and web services. Supports GET, POST, PUT, PATCH, DELETE with custom headers, JSON body, and Basic/Bearer auth. URLs validated against HTTP_TOOL_ALLOWED_ORIGINS allowlist (SSRF guard). Also handles platform git-proxy paths directly.

args.name: url
args.description: Target URL (subject to the SSRF allowlist)

args.name: method
args.description: GET | POST | PUT | PATCH | DELETE (default GET)
